name: Shenzhen Cotran New Material Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Cotran New Material Co.,Ltd. manufactures and provides waterproof and sealing insulation products and solutions in China. It offers PVC, butyl based, silicone based, and EPR based tapes; and silicone and EPDM cold shrink tubes and sleeves. The company provides its solution for telecommunication, power utilities, mining, automobile, and marine industries. Shenzhen Cotran New Material Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is based in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.
